title: San Sebastián, Basque Country — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to San Sebastián, Basque Country: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

San Sebastián is a city in Basque Country with a population of 188,000. A stunning coastal city with a beautiful bay, world-renowned pintxos bars, and more Michelin stars per capita than anywhere.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
